failedAssertions.reason: Better Auth uses global rate limit 100 req/10s, not the per-email 3-per-60s rate limit specified in assertion. All 5 rapid requests returned 200. Re-test confirmed.

For disallowed origin (http://evil.local), Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true is still present. Hono CORS middleware sends credentials header even for disallowed origins. Security issue. Re-test confirmed.

Admin user seeded via seed-admin.ts but sign-in fails with INVALID_EMAIL_OR_PASSWORD. The password hash created by seed script may be invalid or Better Auth's email+password sign-in may use a different hash comparison. Re-test confirmed blocked.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Requires 5 minute wait for OTP expiration (TTL=300s). Not practical for validation workflow. Expiration logic is implemented but cannot be verified without test infrastructure for time advancement.

appliedUpdates.description: Added note about VAL-AUTH-007: Better Auth global rate limit (100 req/10s) differs from per-email OTP rate limit in assertion. Would need custom middleware to implement per-email 3-per-60s limit.

Added note about VAL-AUTH-010: Admin sign-in via password fails even after seeding admin user. Seed script creates user with bcrypt hash but Better Auth email+password sign-in may not be using bcrypt correctly or hash format is incompatible.

Added note about VAL-AUTH-014: Hono CORS middleware sends Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true even for disallowed origins. Security concern - need to configure CORS to not send credentials for origins not in allowlist.

failures: VAL-AUTH-007: Rate limit implementation differs from spec - Better Auth global limit vs per-email 3-per-60s limit. Consider implementing custom middleware for per-email OTP rate limiting.
VAL-AUTH-014: CORS credentials header present for disallowed origin - security issue requiring Hono CORS configuration fix.
VAL-AUTH-010: Admin password authentication not working for seeded user - seed script hash or Better Auth password comparison issue.
blockers: VAL-AUTH-005: OTP expiration requires 5 minute wait - not practical for validation. Expiration logic is implemented based on code review.
VAL-AUTH-010: Admin login blocked by password auth failure - cannot test admin API access without working admin session.
